subject: Fw: Fwd: Jeepers
body:
are they crazy


----- Forwarded Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, February 14, 2007 5:25:20 PM
Subject: Fwd: Jeepers


Please let me know how you wish for me to respond.
 
Darren
Darren:
 
I've been informed that the information you requested was sent earlier today to Jeffrey Epstein and Harry Beller.
 
Seth




From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, February 14, 2007 1:05 PM
To: Lebowitz, Seth
Subject: Jeepers


Seth,
 
After we spoke earlier today, I left three messages for you to call me at 973-597-1165.
 
Please provide me with the following:
 
A list of the dates and the corresponding capital account balances that you maintain can be withdrawn as of each such date in accordance with the provisions of the partnership agreement.
 
The status of FTC's/Jeepers $80 Million withdrawal request on November 13, 2006.
 
 
This e-mail message is intended only for the named recipient(s) above. It may contain confidential information. If you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any use, dissemination, distribution or copying of this e-mail and any attachment(s) is strictly prohibited. D.B. Zwirn & Co., L.P. reserves the right to archive and monitor all e-mail communications through its networks. If you have received this e-mail in error, please immediately notify the sender by replying to this e-mail and delete the message and any attachment(s) from your system. Thank you.


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
Bored stiff? Loosen up... 
Download and play hundreds of games for free on Yahoo! Games.
http://games.yahoo.com/games/front

Seth
